introSection: Incredible Spin Coaster was a steel indoor spinning kiddie roller coaster formerly located at St. Louis' Incredible Pizza Company in St. Louis, Missouri, USA. It opened on November 4, 2016. The coaster was removed sometime between May-September 2024.
fullText:
Incredible Spin Coaster was a steel indoor spinning kiddie roller coaster formerly located at St. Louis' Incredible Pizza Company in St. Louis, Missouri, USA. It opened on November 4, 2016. The coaster was removed sometime between May-September 2024.

Each row sits back-to-back.
